response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, deep learning workload optimization, and hardware-software co-design. The resume shows no evidence of GPU/accelerator architecture work, SIMD/MIMD experience, DNN training/inference optimization, or chip-level performance analysis. Educational background (BS in CS) meets the years-of-experience threshold, but the technical domain mismatch is severe for a Principal-level hardware architecture role.
strengths: 13+ years of software engineering experience meets BS+8 requirement
Some low-level/performance work (DLang microservices handling millions of req/s, C/C++ at National Instruments)
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testing, and craftsmanship culture
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, or deep learning workload optimization background
No SIMD/MIMD, hardware-software co-design, or chip-level performance analysis experience

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
Meets years-of-experience threshold for BS path
